mapper.sql: r.id, r.public_id::text AS "publicKey", NULL::BIGINT AS "hospitalId", 'Global' AS "hospitalName", COALESCE(r.is_system_role, FALSE) AS "isSystemRole", r.name, COALESCE(TO_CHAR(COALESCE(r.created_at, r.created), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), '') AS "createdDate", COALESCE(TO_CHAR(COALESCE(r.modified_at, r.modified), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), '') AS "modifiedDate", COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(uc.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(uc.last_name, ''))), ''), uc.username, '') AS "createdBy", COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(um.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(um.last_name, ''))), ''), um.username, '') AS "modifiedBy"
FROM roles r LEFT JOIN users uc ON uc.id = r.created_by LEFT JOIN users um ON um.id = r.modified_by

WHERE r.is_active = 1
AND UPPER(COALESCE(r.code, '')) <> 'USER_HOSPITAL_SCOPE_ALL'
AND ( COALESCE(r.name, '') ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' )
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE r.is_active = 1 AND r.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT
WHERE r.is_active = 1 AND r.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM roles WHERE id = #{id} AND is_active = 1 AND UPPER(COALESCE(code, '')) = UPPER(#{code})

SELECT DISTINCT u.id AS id, u.public_id::text AS "publicKey", TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(u.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(u.last_name, ''))) AS username FROM users u JOIN user_groups ug ON ug.user_id = u.id WHERE u.is_active = 1 AND ug.is_active = 1 AND ug.role_id = #{id} ORDER BY u.id DESC

SELECT DISTINCT u.id AS id, u.public_id::text AS "publicKey", TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(u.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(u.last_name, ''))) AS username FROM users u JOIN user_groups ug ON ug.user_id = u.id WHERE u.is_active = 1 AND ug.is_active = 1 AND ug.role_id = #{id} ORDER BY u.id DESC
mapper.sql:
WHERE r.is_active = 1
AND UPPER(COALESCE(r.code, '')) <> 'USER_HOSPITAL_SCOPE_ALL'
AND ( r.name ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM roles WHERE is_active = 1 AND LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(name, ''))) = LOWER(TRIM(#{name})) AND id != #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO roles ( code, name, is_system_role, is_active, created_by, created, created_at ) VALUES ( MD5(CAST(clock_timestamp() AS text)), TRIM(#{name}), FALSE, #{isActive}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO user_groups (user_id, role_id, is_active, created, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleId}, 1, NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (user_id, role_id) DO UPDATE SET is_active = 1, modified = NOW(), modified_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM roles WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users u WHERE u.is_active = 1 AND u.id IN
#{id}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) FROM users u INNER JOIN user_hospitals uh ON uh.user_id = u.id WHERE u.is_active = 1 AND uh.is_active = 1 AND uh.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND u.id IN
#{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE user_groups SET is_active = 2, modified = NOW(), modified_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_groups SET is_active = 2, modified = NOW(), modified_at = NOW() WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.update: UPDATE roles SET name = #{name}, is_active = #{isActive}, modified = NOW(), modified_at = NOW(), modified_by = #{modifiedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE roles SET is_active = 2, modified = NOW(), modified_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_system_role = FALSE
UPDATE roles SET is_active = 2, modified = NOW(), modified_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND UPPER(COALESCE(code, '')) <> 'USER_HOSPITAL_SCOPE_ALL'
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT mt.id, mt.public_id::text AS "publicKey", mt.code, mt.name, mt.name_other AS "nameOther", mt.menu_group_code AS "groupCode", mt.menu_group_name AS "groupName", mt.menu_group_order AS "groupOrderNo", mt.display_order AS "displayOrder" FROM user_groups ug JOIN roles r ON r.id = ug.role_id JOIN role_module_details rmd ON rmd.role_id = r.id JOIN module_details md ON md.id = rmd.module_detail_id AND md.is_active = 1 JOIN modules m ON m.id = md.module_id AND m.is_active = 1 JOIN module_types mt ON mt.id = m.module_type_id AND mt.is_active = 1 WHERE ug.user_id = #{userId} AND ug.is_active = 1 AND r.is_active = 1 ORDER BY mt.display_order ASC, mt.id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT u.id AS "userId", u.username FROM roles r JOIN user_groups ug ON ug.role_id = r.id AND ug.is_active = 1 JOIN users u ON u.id = ug.user_id AND u.is_active = 1 WHERE LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(r.name, ''))) = LOWER(TRIM(#{name})) AND r.is_active = 1 ORDER BY u.id DESC
